title: groov e Wired Full-Size Keyboard - Computer Accessories for Laptops and PCs, Ergonomic Design, Silent Keys, USB Connection, Qwerty Keyboard - Black
features: WIRED KEYBOARD - Upgrade your computing setup with the Groov-e Wired Keyboard and redefine how you work and play; elevate your typing experience with a touch of modern convenience

PLUG & PLAY - Made to meet the standards of modern convenience, this keyboard uses an integrated USB cable to connect to your PC or laptop; there are no hassles, setups or installs, simply plug and play
ERGONOMIC DESIGN - This computer accessory offers an ergonomic design to provide users with a comfortable and versatile experience for optimal performance
FULL-SIZED KEYBOARD - The keyboard is a full-sized qwerty keyboard to offer accurate typing while the quiet keys let you work with a minimal amount of excess noise

RELIABLE CONNECTION - The computer peripheral uses a standard USB connector to ensure you have an uninterrupted and reliable connection that avoids any input delays and provides high-speed communication between your PC and the input device

USB connection Designed for modern convenience, this keyboard has an integrated USB cable for easy connection to your PC or laptop.
